chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1741 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate Generals Sindh along with Zahid Ali Abbasi Secretary School Education & Literacy Department, Junaid Hameed Samo Chief Programme Manager Reform Support Unit /respondent No.2 and Muhammad Sarwar Rajput District Education Officer, Elementary Secondary & Higher Secondary, Sanghar. Petitioner present in person states that her case is similar to the case of petitioners in C.P. No.D-1416 of 2020 and C.P. No.D-584 of 2022, as such, she would be satisfied if instant petition is disposed of in terms of the orders dated 26.01.2022 and 09.03.2022 respectively passed by this Court in aforesaid petitions. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh present raises no objection to the above proposal. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of with direction to Secretary Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh to refer the case of the petitioner to Grievance Redressal Committee to examine the case of the petitioner thoroughly and after hearing her and pass a speaking order. During Scrutiny, if petitioner is found qualified for the post, she applied for, then she shall be accommodated against said post; however, strictly in accordance with the policy in vogue at the relevant time/rules. This exercise shall be completed within two months from the date of receipt of this order. Compliance report should be submitted through Additional Registrar of this Court.

This exercise shall be completed within two months from the date of receipt of this order. Compliance report should be submitted through Additional Registrar of this Court. Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
